data.name: Darker: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
DARKER - 一個關於鐵桿腐敗、羞辱和復仇的故事。

臣服和控制的旅程。

Grace 的故事充滿了權力鬥爭、羞辱和腐敗。當她被帶入一個支配一切、反抗漸漸消失的世界時，她的每一個選擇都讓她更接近完全的屈服，或是絕望的控制幻覺。

令人難忘的人物和真實的個性。

遊戲中的每個角色都經過深度、情感和逼真度的精心打造，讓每一次互動都有身歷其境的感覺，而且極具衝擊力。

選擇會導致新的慾望......或新的墮落深度。

旅程不只是她的，也是你的。有些門永遠不應該打開，然而好奇心和力量卻令人陶醉。她會反抗、屈服還是適應？

原始而激烈的性愛場面。

每一次邂逅都是為了讓您盡可能感受到激烈和身臨其境的感覺而設計的，清晰的視覺效果、流暢的動畫和污穢的音效讓每一次呻吟、拍打和插入都栩栩如生。

每個動作都有後果。每個場景都突破極限。

遊戲提供多條探索路徑的分支敘事、身歷其境的情色邂逅，以及快感與痛苦融為一體的世界。

Darker： 第 1 章 功能：

  • 超過 5,000+ 張高品質的 2K (1440p) 解析度渲染圖，讓每個場景都栩栩如生。

  • 具有身歷其境音效、環境音軌和 NSFW 音訊的完整視聽體驗。

  • 多種選擇和分支路徑可供探索，塑造出格蕾絲的下場。

  • 獨特、時尚的使用者介面，提供所有必要的客製化選項。

  • 精心製作的情色動畫，雖然數量不多，但卻用心製作。

踏上《Darker》的緊張旅程，第 1 章為心靈的墮落埋下伏筆。

不需要像其他視覺小說一樣等待早期存取更新，在 2026 年 4 月推出時體驗完整版遊戲吧！！

data.short_description: 《Darker》是一款故事驅動的成人視覺小說，融合了深度敘事與硬核成人內容。跟隨格蕾絲（Grace）墜入扭曲的控制、屈辱與復仇之網。在道德脆弱的世界裡，她會抗拒，還是墮入黑暗？選擇權在你手中。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 or Higher (64-bit versions)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 / AMD Phenom II X4 965 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with at least 512 MB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit versions)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 備註: Headphones recommended for the best immersive experience.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra) or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1 chip
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics or Apple Silicon
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 備註: Headphones recommended for the best immersive experience.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04, SteamOS 3.0, or equivalent (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with OpenGL 3.3 support or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04, SteamOS 3.0, or equivalent (64-bit)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 備註: Headphones recommended for the best immersive experience.

data.name: Darker: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
DARKER – A Story of hardcore Corruption, humiliation, and Revenge.

Play as Grace, a seemingly innocent girl next door, as she’s lured into a dark and intoxicating game of corruption. Join her on a vacation that quickly unravels into a series of daring, erotic challenges, where one choice leads to another and everything begins to spiral out of control.

UNFORGETTABLE CHARACTERS & AUTHENTIC PERSONALITIES.

Every character in the game is crafted with depth, emotion, and realism, making interaction feel immersive and impactful.

A JOURNEY OF SUBMISSION AND CONTROL.

Grace's story is one of power struggles, humiliation, and corruption. As she’s pulled deeper into a world where dominance reigns and resistance fades, every choice pushes her closer to total submission, or the desperate illusion of control.

CHOICES LEAD TO NEW DESIRES… OR NEW DEPTHS OF DEPRAVITY.

The journey isn’t just hers, it's yours. Some doors should never be opened, yet curiosity and power are intoxicating. Will she fight, submit, or adapt?

RAW & INTENSE SEX SCENES.

Every encounter is designed to be intense and immersive, with explicit visuals, fluid animations, and erotic sound effects that bring every moan, slap, and thrust to life.

EVERY ACTION HAS CONSEQUENCES. EVERY SCENE PUSHES THE LIMITS.

Experience a branching narrative with multiple paths to explore. Darker is a two-chapter duology, with Chapter 1 setting the stage for a darker, more intense storyline and its ultimate conclusion.

Darker: Chapter 1 Features:

  • Over 5,000+ high-quality renders in stunning 2K (1440p) resolution, bringing every scene to life.

  • A complete audiovisual experience with immersive sound effects, ambient tracks, and NSFW audio.

  • Multiple choices and branching paths to explore, shaping Grace’s descent.

  • A distinctive, sleek UI with all essential customization options.

  • Meticulously detailed erotic animations, few in number but crafted with care.

No waiting for early access updates like other visual novels. Experience the full version of the game when it launches in May 2026!!

data.short_description: Darker is a story-driven erotic visual novel blending deep storytelling with hardcore adult content. Follow Grace’s descent into a twisted web of control, humiliation, and revenge. In a world where morality is fragile, will she resist or surrender to the darkness? The choice is yours.
